prompt: Burn down the ops queue — start working the open bugs.
note: the burn-down loop starts by listing the queue. Actually fixing an item needs code edits + git (not observable under the MCP-only lockdown), so this asserts the entry point: route to ops-work and pull the queue.

prompt: Pick up the highest-priority open item in the ops queue and look at what it needs.
note: list the queue, then read an item's detail — the read half of the burn-down loop
